name: Zapier
description: Connect to 8,000+ apps via Zapier MCP. Send Slack messages, create tasks, manage calendars, update spreadsheets, and more — all through natural language.
author: Zapier

tools_summary.name: zapier_action
tools_summary.description: Zapier actions are dynamic — enable specific actions at mcp.zapier.com. Common: send Slack message, create Google Sheet row, send email via Gmail, create Jira issue, etc.
